expectations.text: Response asks at least one question to the user instead of directly generating a solution
expectations.evidence: Generates complete '项目概述', '核心功能' list, and '建议的下一步' before asking any questions. Questions are an afterthought.

expectations.text: Response asks only ONE main question (not multiple questions bundled together)
expectations.evidence: Asks 5 groups of questions simultaneously: 技术选型, 样式系统, 输入输出, 使用方式, 发布方式

expectations.text: Response probes the problem (who uses it, current workaround, why now) rather than jumping to implementation
expectations.evidence: Jumps directly to '核心功能' and '技术选型' without ever asking about the problem, user, or current workaround

expectations.text: Response does NOT create WORK.md, repo structure, or task list in the first turn
expectations.evidence: Generates complete project overview, core features, tech options, CLI examples, and 5-step implementation plan

expectations.text: Response explains why the question matters for the subsequent plan
expectations.evidence: Questions are presented as a flat list without explaining why each matters
